articles.title: Shoaib Ibrahim’s Sister Saba Ibrahim Says Father Is Recovering But ‘Abhi Bhi Duaaon Ki Zarurat Hai’
articles.description: Saba Ibrahim shared a health update on her father, saying he is recovering and doing better. She also thanked fans for their prayers and requested continued support.

articles.title: Blake Lively goes on a frozen yoghurt date with Ryan Reynolds, amid legal troubles with Justin Baldoni: 'Pineapple flavor is bonkers'
articles.description: Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds enjoyed a frozen yogurt date in New York City, sharing their dessert choices on Instagram. This outing occurred amidst legal proceedings involving Justin Baldoni, where Lively sought legal fees after their lawsuit was settled before the scheduled date. Both actors' legal teams declared the resolution a significant victory.

articles.title: Arunachala creations, Harsh Roshan next titled Thella Kaagitham; First Look Out Now
articles.description: Young and talented actor Harsh Roshan is all set to begin an exciting new chapter in his career with his next film under the Arunachala Creations banner. Backed by producer Krishna Kommalapati, the project comes after the actor’s impressive success with acclaimed films like Court and Band Melam. With a strong focus on emotions, romance, and relatable storytelling, the makers are promising a refreshing cinematic experience for audiences. The film has been titled Thella Kaagitham, and its first-look poster was unveiled today, generating considerable buzz among movie lovers. Thella Kaagitham is described as a heartwarming musical love story that revolves around youthful emotions and memorable relationships. The first-look poster offers a glimpse into the film’s charming world, featuring Harsh Roshan and leading lady Nakshatra sharing a beautiful moment while riding a bicycle against a picturesque backdrop. The visually appealing poster reflects the film’s romantic essence and has already struck a chord with audiences, raising expectations for the project. The film is penned by talented writer Nandu Savirigana, who has earned recognition for co-writing successful entertainers such as Samajavaragamana and Nari Nari Naduma Murari. Apart from crafting the story, Nandu has also written the screenplay and dialogues, ensuring a cohesive narrative filled with engaging moments and emotional depth. Making his directorial debut with this venture is Ramesh Bandreddi, who is expected to bring a fresh perspective to the romantic entertainer. Adding further strength to the project is a highly skilled technical team. Music sensation Vijai Bulganin, known for delivering the chartbuster soundtrack of Baby, has been roped in to compose the music, making the film one of the most anticipated musical romances in recent times. Acclaimed cinematographer KV Guhan will handle the visuals, while experienced editor Karthika Srinivas will oversee the film’s editing. With a promising cast, an accomplished creative team, and an appealing love story at its core, Thella Kaagitham is shaping up to be an exciting addition to Telugu cinema. Cast : Harsh Roshan, Nakshatra and others Technical Team: Banner: Arunachala Creations Directed by Ramesh Bandreddi Produced by Krishna Kommalapati Story, Screenplay & Dialogues by Nandu Savirigana Director of Photography: K. V. Guhan Music: Vijai Bulganin Editor: Karthika Srinivas R Production Designer: Chinna Executive Producer: Ravi Surneddi Choreography: Eshwar Penti Co-Director: Ramesh Bonam PRO: Vamsi Kaka Marketing: Walls & Trends Publicity Designer: Diwa Peddaveeti
articles.source: Latest Movie Updates, Film News, Movie Reviews,pre

articles.title: Remaining '60 Minutes' stars say they're staying, don't want to see CBS show die
articles.description: Saying "We don't want to see '60 Minutes' die," the three remaining correspondents at the turmoil-plagued CBS News program have decided to stay, for now.

articles.title: 'I Knew It, I Knew You,' Taylor Swift returns to pop country for 'Toy Story 5'
articles.description: Taylor Swift's new song for the Disney and Pixar's forthcoming "Toy Story 5" film is here. On Friday, Swift released "I Knew It, I Knew You," a bit of a return to country music for the performer who first made a name for herself in the Nashville music scene before taking over the world.

articles.title: Madhoo recalls Nana Patekar slapping her hard during a scene in Yeshwant: ‘I slapped him back’
articles.description: Reflecting on the shocking on-set moment, Madhoo revealed that the physical blow arrived entirely out of nowhere.

articles.title: Pahlaj Nihalani Prayer Meet: Hema Malini, Shatrughan Sinha, Anil Kapoor, Jackie Shroff And More Mourn Filmmaker
articles.description: Bollywood turned up in Mumbai to pay their last respects to late producer Pahlaj Nihalani, who was the former chairman of the Central Board of Film Certification (CBFC). Nihalani died on June 4 at age 74.

articles.title: Ram Charan’s ‘Peddi’ storms box office, crosses ₹180 crore worldwide in just 2 days
articles.description: Ram Charan's film "Peddi" has made a strong debut. The movie earned over 180 crore rupees globally in its first two days. This sports action drama is set in rural Andhra Pradesh in the 1980s. It features Shiva Rajkumar and Janhvi Kapoor. AR Rahman composed the music for the film. The movie is produced by Vriddhi Cinemas.

articles.title: Shilpa Shinde breaks silence with cryptic post after AICWA seeks strict action over false allegation admission: ‘Jo ukhadna hai...’
articles.description: Shilpa Shinde has reacted indirectly to the ongoing backlash surrounding her recent statements, posting a bold message on social media shortly after calls for disciplinary action intensified.

articles.title: Vijay Sethupathi dubs ‘Slumdog’ teaser in 3 languages
articles.description: Vijay Sethupathi has lent his voice in Tamil, Telugu, and Hindi for the teaser of Puri Jagannadh's 'Slumdog - 33 Temple Road', set for release on June 8th. The film, featuring Tabu and Samyuktha, is in post-production with music composer Harshavardhan Rameshwar. Shooting is complete, with a theatrical release planned for June in five languages.

articles.title: Sunny Deol, Karan Deol starrer Batwara teaser to drop on June 15: Report
articles.description: Sunny Deol and Karan Deol are set to share the screen for the first time in their upcoming film Batwara, formerly titled Lahore 1947. The makers are gearing up to release the film’s teaser on June 15, building anticipation ahead of its theatrical release.

articles.title: Top 7 Pune localities offering affordable rentals and excellent connectivity
articles.description: Pune has become one of India's most sought-after cities for students, young professionals, and families due to its thriving IT sector, educational institutions and pleasant living environment. Pune is Maharashtra's second-largest city and is home to several renowned educational institutions. Every year, thousands of students and working professionals move to the city seeking better academic and career opportunities. As a result, demand for rental housing continues to rise across Pune's residential market.

articles.title: Mayim Bialik talks about the side effects of weight loss meds
articles.description: Mayim Bialik, who gained fame through her role in 'The Big Bang Theory,' candidly shared her rocky journey with weight loss medication. After taking a single dose of a GLP-1 drug prescribed for persistent health challenges, she experienced debilitating gastrointestinal issues, such as intense bloating, diarrhea, and widespread bodily discomfort.

articles.title: Ranveer Singh's Father 'Thanked' Poonam Dhillon For Her Support Amid Don 3 Row
articles.description: Poonam Dhillon shared that Ranveer's family was deeply appreciative of the solidarity shown by members of the film industry during the backlash.

articles.description: Puri Jagannadh says Vijay Sethupathi finished dubbing the Slumdog 33 Temple Road teaser in Tamil, Telugu and Hindi, teaser out June 8, film to release pan India.

articles.title: Shilpa Shetty’s Maa Hai Na OTT release: Where to watch
articles.description: Join Shilpa Shetty Kundra in the vibrant world of 'Maa Hai Na,' a quirky new cooking comedy on ZEE5 that's sure to be a hit. With a cast of celebrity mother-child pairings including Urvashi Dholakia with her son Kshitij and Sunita Ahuja alongside daughter Tina, expect a blend of culinary creations, laughter, and family bonding.

articles.title: A pet cat naps on Lord Krishna idol’s bed, and the internet can’t stop smiling
articles.description: A heartwarming video of Rehant Thakur conversing with his cat, Ketu, sleeping on Lord Krishna's bed has charmed the internet. Rehant playfully asks Ketu whose bed it is, but the unbothered feline remains asleep. Viewers adored the gentle interaction and Ketu's relaxed demeanor, calling it wholesome content that has captured many hearts.

articles.description: He added, "Every woman deserves to be respected, valued and represented with dignity."

articles.description: Bandar box office collection Day 1: The film has performed better than Nishaanchi, which had grossed Rs 25 lakh on its opening day despite a higher number of shows at 1,785.

articles.title: Rithvik Dhanjani on how Khatron Ke Khiladi has changed him as a person; says, ‘Every stunt reminds you that life is to be cherished’
articles.description: Actor Rithvik Dhanjani is set to participate in Khatron Ke Khiladi 15, marking his third appearance. He emphasizes that mental strength, not just physical agility, is key to overcoming fears on the show. Dhanjani shared that the reality series has taught him the importance of cherishing life and living each moment to its fullest, as it can be unpredictable.

articles.title: Karuppu & Blast power K-Town’s summer surge
articles.description: After a sluggish start due to the election, Suriya’s blockbuster Karuppu and surprise hit Blast have helped Kollywood box office rebound.

articles.description: Reality show contestant Vanshaj Singh addressed cheating allegations from ex-girlfriend Pooja Goswami. He revealed Pooja is now dating his former flatmate, a betrayal he found deeply upsetting. Vanshaj explained his own struggles post-breakup, emphasizing his dedication to work and personal growth despite the emotional turmoil.

articles.title: Meet late 'Ted Lasso' star Anthony Head's family
articles.description: Beloved actor Anthony Head, famed for 'Buffy' and 'Ted Lasso', has passed away at 72 from pneumonia complications. His daughters, Emily and Daisy, also actresses, announced his peaceful death. Head shared a decades-long partnership with animal welfare advocate Sarah Fisher, who predeceased him. He prioritized family, even leaving 'Buffy' to return home.

articles.description: Born and raised in Lagos, Nigeria, Stanley arrived in India in 2019 as a student.

articles.description: Ahead of the release of their raunchy romcom Office Romance, Jennifer Lopez and Brett Goldstein sat down for a hearty chat. While talking about their upcoming comedy, Lopez said, 'You think romantic comedy, you think it's a woman's movie. But because Brett and Joe (Kelly) wrote it who write ‘Shrinking,’ who write ‘Ted Lasso, there's a guy sensibility to it that men are gonna love.' Watch the video for more from the Office Romance stars.

articles.title: 'Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai' earns Rs 11 crore on Day 1
articles.description: Varun Dhawan's 'Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai' has kicked off its box office journey with a strong opening, earning an estimated Rs 7.50 crore net on its first day. The family entertainer significantly outperformed other releases like 'Bandar' and 'Peddi'.

articles.title: 'Drishyam 3' BO day 16: Mohanlal film falls by 14 percent
articles.description: Mohanlal's 'Drishyam 3' continues its strong box office run, crossing Rs 231 crore worldwide. Despite minor daily drops, the film maintained stability in its third week. The Malayalam version significantly boosted collections, with night shows proving most popular. The thriller, facing mixed reviews, has already achieved significant commercial success.

articles.title: ‘Toy Story 5,’ Taylor Swift and the secret: Team had to create a ‘decoy version’ to keep the project under wraps
articles.description: In a stunning turn of events, Taylor Swift's surprise partnership for 'Toy Story 5' was kept a tight secret for months, even baffling the film crew. A visual effects whiz disclosed that Swift got to preview an early draft, composed the catchy track 'I Knew It, I Knew You,' and presented it to the production team.

articles.title: Dialogue of the day from Aamir Khan's Fanaa: 'Humse door jaoge kaise...'
articles.description: Movie Dialogue of the day: Fanaa was set in Delhi and Kashmir and the narrative follows Zooni, a blind Kashmiri woman who falls in love with her tour guide Rehan, unaware that he is hiding a dangerous secret.

articles.title: Anant V Joshi on replacing Vaibhav Raj Gupta in Gullak season 5: ‘My intention was never to mimic somebody’
articles.description: After four seasons of Vaibhav Raj Gupta playing the role, Anant V Joshi has stepped into the character's shoes.

articles.title: Meghan Markle's Princess Lilibet birthday post sparks debate as fans question Prince Archie's absence from family photos
articles.description: Princess Lilibet's fifth birthday photos sparked online debate, with many questioning Prince Archie's absence and the children's appearance. Critics called the post performative, especially given Meghan's recent speech on online child safety. PR experts suggest the curated images aim to bolster her lifestyle brand, hinting at a strategic unveiling of family life.

articles.title: Who is Rachel Nickell's killer Robert Napper and where is he now? What the new documentary reveals about her murder
articles.description: Robert Clive Napper, born in London in 1966, was already linked to a series of violent sexual attacks in southeast London before Rachel Nickell's murder.

articles.title: Six new K-dramas to watch this week on OTT starring Lee Jae Wook, Jin Ki Joo, Lim Ji Yeon: Doctor on the Edge to Teach You a Lesson to My Royal Nemesis
articles.description: This week's K-drama releases have a diverse range of genres, from medical romance and fantasy to thrillers and military comedies. New titles like Doctor on the Edge and The Lie We Lived In have arrived, alongside ongoing favourites. Viewers can explore time-travelling villains, contract killers, and disciplined students, with See You At Work Tomorrow also generating anticipation. Read on!

articles.title: Madhoo praises Ranveer: ‘People who laughed at him are his fans’
articles.description: Veteran actress Madhoo has showered praise on Ranveer Singh, calling his journey in the film industry “amazing” and admitting that she would love to share screen space with him in the future. In a recent interview, the actress reflected on how her perception of Ranveer evolved over the years and hailed his ability to remain true to himself despite constant criticism.

articles.title: Quote of the day by famous writer Honore De Balzac: ''Our worst misfortunes never happen, and most miseries lie in anticipation' ; What French author's words teaches us about staying positive in life
articles.description: French writer Honore De Balzac warned that our worst misfortunes rarely happen, with most misery stemming from anticipation. This timeless advice remains relevant today, especially for those battling anxiety. Balzac, a pioneer of realism, penned influential works like 'The Human Comedy'. His life was marked by health struggles and a brief marriage before his passing.

articles.title: Anthony Head passes away at 72; ‘Buffy’ co-stars pay tribute
articles.description: Beloved British actor Anthony Head, celebrated for his roles as Rupert Giles in "Buffy the Vampire Slayer" and Rupert Mannion in "Ted Lasso," has passed away at 72. His daughters confirmed his death was due to pneumonia complications. Head first gained prominence in 1980s UK television ads before achieving international acclaim.

articles.title: Lamine Yamal and Inés García’s combined net worth in 2026: Earnings, endorsements, investments, and lifestyle
articles.description: Football prodigy Lamine Yamal and social media influencer Inés García are a prominent young celebrity couple in Spain. While Yamal's net worth is estimated between $5-8 million in 2026 due to his football career and endorsements, García's financial situation remains private. Both are experiencing growing public profiles and potential for future wealth accumulation.

articles.title: “She no longer trusts them”: Taylor Swift reportedly shuts out Blake Lively and Ryan Reynolds while wedding plans with Travis Kelce intensify
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have billions waiting for them to tie the knot as it seems they have completely immersed themselves in planning their big, fat wedding, sparking chaos among billions, As rumors swirl about which high profile guests will be invited to their lavish wedding, it seems the billionaire pop star has made it clear what she feels about popular Hollywood actress Blake Lively and her husband, Ryan Reynolds.

articles.title: Meet Bollywood Actress Who Left Showbiz, Got Married, Changed Her Name But Faced Divorce Before Finding True Love
articles.description: Neelam Kothari, popular Bollywood actress of the 1980s and 1990s, is known for her successful films and graceful screen presence. After stepping away from films, she married a US-based businessman. After her divorce, she found love and happiness with actor Sameer Soni and their adopted daughter.

articles.title: “Sanjay Dutt needed an electric shock due to drug addiction, Sunil Dutt Saab was very upset”, When filmmaker Rajiv Rai recalled axing actor from Yudh
articles.description: On Sunil Dutt’s birth anniversary, here’s a throwback to when Rajiv Rai recalled removing Sanjay Dutt from Yudh due to drug addiction, leaving Sunil Dutt deeply upset.

articles.title: Sneako says he’s getting married, but there’s more to the story behind viral clip
articles.description: Internet sensation Sneako sparked widespread speculation with a viral clip announcing his marriage. However, the streamer later clarified in the same video that it was a deliberate joke, highlighting how edited clips can mislead audiences. This revelation left many fans confused, as the initial announcement was shared without full context.
